hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Start by getting the number of buildings with numBuildings()

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Track the x position, starting at 1, and increase by 5 for each building

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: For each building, get a random number of floors

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Build ground floor, then upper floors in a nested loop, then the roof
